contextSlices: Repair only the failures listed by the prior judicial handoff and runner evidence.
Do not validate your own repair and do not certify delivery.
Return a repair handoff that identifies files changed, commands run, remaining limitations, and handoffTo judicial.
forbiddenInputs: full prior chat transcript unless explicitly listed in inputReferences
implementation files outside task capsule scope unless explicitly referenced
limitations: Context package records bounded inputs; it does not by itself prove LLM context isolation.
